negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_401f484c-0110-47ba-9c2d-d67d32b38237
prompt: A man with short, brown, curly hair and a small patch of gray in front of his right ear, a brown beard, and a black long-sleeve jacket explores a scenic coastal forest trail. He carries a black backpack and holds a black camera with a large lens in his left hand. The man walks along a light sandy path, facing the right side of the screen as he moves in that direction. The camera tracks him, capturing his right profile and partially from the back. As he walks, he tilts his head slightly to the left, then angles it further left and upward. His gaze lowers again as he continues. The path beneath him is a light sandy color, bordered by brown and green grass that sways gently in the breeze. In the middle ground, a few branches and a large rock lie across the way. Tall, slender trees with foliage only at the very tops stretch from left to right, many of their trunks leaning towards the left of the frame. The forest floor is a mix of soil and low-lying grass, with scattered undergrowth adding texture to the landscape.  In the background, extending from left to right, the gray ocean can be seen, with giant boulders poking out of the water not far from the shore. The boulder is visible towards the center of the frame as the camera pans right, revealing more gnarled trees along the edge of the beach. Some pieces of driftwood appear towards the right side of the frame. The sky above the water is cloudy and gray, creating a hazy atmosphere. The scene is captured at eye level with a medium shot throughout, emphasizing the natural beauty of the coastal forest trail and the serene ocean beyond.
